alteracoes.en: You see a dog. He seems to be following you.
alteracoes.de: You see a dog. He seems to be following you.
alteracoes.para: Você vê um cão. Ele parece estar te seguindo.

alteracoes.en: It seems that you have made a friend of this dog.
alteracoes.de: It seems that you have made a friend of this dog.
alteracoes.para: Parece que você fez um amigo deste cachorro.

alteracoes.en: You earn 200 experience for befriending the dog.
alteracoes.de: You earn 200 experience for befriending the dog.
alteracoes.para: Você ganha 200 de experiência por fazer amizade com o cão.

alteracoes.en: You earn 335 experience for defeating the dog and letting Phil back into his house.
alteracoes.de: You earn 335 experience for defeating the dog and letting Phil back into his house.
alteracoes.para: Você ganha 335 de experiência por derrotar o cão e deixar o Phil voltar pra casa dele.

alteracoes.en: For some reason, this dog likes you.
alteracoes.de: For some reason, this dog likes you.
alteracoes.para: Por algum motivo, este cão gosta de você.

alteracoes.en: experience for helping Phil solve his canine conundrum.
alteracoes.de: experience for helping Phil solve his canine conundrum.
alteracoes.para: de experiência por ajudar o Phil a resolver seu dilema canino.

alteracoes.en: The dog seems to think you are his owner.
alteracoes.de: The dog seems to think you are his owner.
alteracoes.para: O cão parece achar que você é o dono dele.

alteracoes.en: experience for helping Phil solve his canine conundrum.
alteracoes.de: experience for helping Phil solve his canine conundrum.
alteracoes.para: de experiência por ajudar o Phil a resolver seu dilema canino.
Sai do caminho, parceiro. Bom garoto.

alteracoes.en: You see a strange disk from the Military Base.
alteracoes.de: You see a strange disk from the Military Base.
alteracoes.para: Você vê um disco estranho da Base Militar.

alteracoes.en: This particular holodisk is in excellent shape. The shiny label reads: "Vault Locations v34.129".
alteracoes.de: This particular holodisk is in excellent shape. The shiny label reads: "Vault Locations v34.129".
alteracoes.para: Este holodisco em particular está em excelente estado. O rótulo brilhante diz: "Localizações de Vault v34.129".

alteracoes.en: Crypts should not be here, should they boys? [The other Fools shake their heads.]  I think you should leave.
alteracoes.de: Crypts should not be here, should they boys? [The other Fools shake their heads.]  I think you should leave.
alteracoes.para: Crypts não deveriam estar aqui, deveriam, rapazes? [Os outros Tolos balançam a cabeça.] Acho que você deveria ir embora.

alteracoes.en: I made a mistake joining the Crypts.  I want to be on your side.
alteracoes.de: I made a mistake joining the Crypts.  I want to be on your side.
alteracoes.para: Cometi um erro ao me juntar aos Crypts. Quero estar do seu lado.

alteracoes.en: I came with a message from Phrax.
alteracoes.de: I came with a message from Phrax.
alteracoes.para: Vim com uma mensagem do Phrax.

alteracoes.en: Then we should wear the coat of a betrayer?  One who would deliver their own?  No dog is as low as you.
alteracoes.de: Then we should wear the coat of a betrayer?  One who would deliver their own?  No dog is as low as you.
alteracoes.para: Então devemos vestir o manto de um traidor? Alguém que entregaria os próprios? Nenhum cão é tão baixo quanto você.

alteracoes.en: I feel as if your coat may turn again, but your words sway me.
alteracoes.de: I feel as if your coat may turn again, but your words sway me.
alteracoes.para: Sinto que seu manto pode virar de novo, mas suas palavras me convencem.

alteracoes.en: Phrax is not brave enough to speak this message with his own voice?  He is no man, of that I know.  And he sends this boy to say his words.  Well, then, say them and be done.
alteracoes.de: Phrax is not brave enough to speak this message with his own voice?  He is no man, of that I know.  And he sends this boy to say his words.  Well, then, say them and be done.
alteracoes.para: O Phrax não é corajoso o bastante pra dizer esta mensagem com a própria voz? Ele não é homem, disso eu sei. E manda este rapaz pra dizer as palavras dele. Bom, então, diga-as e acabe logo.

alteracoes.en: He said to leave town and you won't be killed.
alteracoes.de: He said to leave town and you won't be killed.
alteracoes.para: Ele disse pra você sair da cidade e não será morto.

alteracoes.en: He said have a nice day.
alteracoes.de: He said have a nice day.
alteracoes.para: Ele disse pra ter um bom dia.

alteracoes.en: Hahaha! I like a man with a sense of humor. You can live. Sorry, just joking.
alteracoes.de: Hahaha! I like a man with a sense of humor. You can live. Sorry, just joking.
alteracoes.para: Hahaha! Gosto de um homem com senso de humor. Você pode viver. Desculpa, só brincadeira.

alteracoes.en: I don't think you fully understand the ramifications of what you just said. I hope you learn them before your bones dry in the desert sun. Unfortunately, I don't think you have very long.
alteracoes.de: I don't think you fully understand the ramifications of what you just said. I hope you learn them before your bones dry in the desert sun. Unfortunately, I don't think you have very long.
alteracoes.para: Acho que você não entende bem as consequências do que acabou de dizer. Espero que as aprenda antes que seus ossos sequem no sol do deserto. Infelizmente, acho que você não tem muito tempo.

alteracoes.en: What have we here?  We heard that someone new was in town. This must be you, everyone else looks oh so familiar. Please allow me to introduce myself. I am Baka, Queen of the Fools.
alteracoes.de: What have we here?  We heard that someone new was in town. This must be you, everyone else looks oh so familiar. Please allow me to introduce myself. I am Baka, Queen of the Fools.
alteracoes.para: O que temos aqui? Ouvimos que havia alguém novo na cidade. Deve ser você, todos os outros parecem tão familiares. Permita-me apresentar. Sou Baka, Rainha dos Tolos.

alteracoes.en: Why do you call yourselves the Fools?
alteracoes.de: Why do you call yourselves the Fools?
alteracoes.para: Por que vocês se chamam de Tolos?

alteracoes.en: I hear that the Crypts and you are having some difficulties.
alteracoes.de: I hear that the Crypts and you are having some difficulties.
alteracoes.para: Ouvi dizer que os Crypts e vocês estão tendo algumas dificuldades.

alteracoes.en: You look like a fool to me.
alteracoes.de: You look like a fool to me.

alteracoes.en: After the War, only the Foolish remain. If I was brave enough, I would have taken my own life years ago. Instead, I pander to whatever gods of chance are left.
alteracoes.de: After the War, only the Foolish remain. If I was brave enough, I would have taken my own life years ago. Instead, I pander to whatever gods of chance are left.
alteracoes.para: Depois da Guerra, só os Tolos restam. Se eu fosse corajosa o bastante, teria tirado minha própria vida anos atrás. Em vez disso, bajulo os deuses do acaso que sobraram.

alteracoes.en: Understandable.  I sort of agree with it.  Can I join?
alteracoes.de: Understandable.  I sort of agree with it.  Can I join?
alteracoes.para: Compreensível. Mais ou menos concordo com isso. Posso entrar?

alteracoes.en: We could use another hand. Let me think about this.[She puts her hand to her chin, and parades around the room dramatically.]
alteracoes.de: We could use another hand. Let me think about this.[She puts her hand to her chin, and parades around the room dramatically.]
alteracoes.para: Bem que a gente precisa de mais uma mão. Deixa eu pensar nisso. [Ela leva a mão ao queixo e desfila pela sala dramaticamente.]

alteracoes.en: Be careful with the words you choose.  Not all are as forgiving as I am.  I play the part, or the part plays me, but there is always room for another corpse to liven the drama.
alteracoes.de: Be careful with the words you choose.  Not all are as forgiving as I am.  I play the part, or the part plays me, but there is always room for another corpse to liven the drama.
alteracoes.para: Cuidado com as palavras que você escolhe. Nem todos são tão indulgentes quanto eu. Eu faço o papel, ou o papel me faz, mas sempre há espaço pra mais um cadáver dar vida ao drama.

alteracoes.en: I wasn't sure, was that a threat?
alteracoes.de: I wasn't sure, was that a threat?
alteracoes.para: Não tenho certeza, isso foi uma ameaça?

alteracoes.en: It was, now it is among the last words you will ever hear.
alteracoes.de: It was, now it is among the last words you will ever hear.
alteracoes.para: Foi, e agora está entre as últimas palavras que você vai ouvir.

alteracoes.en: I want to join your gang.
alteracoes.de: I want to join your gang.

alteracoes.en: Why do you want the Power Generator?
alteracoes.de: Why do you want the Power Generator?
alteracoes.para: Por que você quer o Gerador de Energia?

alteracoes.en: I don't know if I should trust you.  Prove your worth.
alteracoes.de: I don't know if I should trust you.  Prove your worth.
alteracoes.para: Não sei se devo confiar em você. Prove seu valor.

alteracoes.en: This chicken walks into a bar . . .
alteracoes.de: This chicken walks into a bar . . .

alteracoes.en: You could use a good man around here.
alteracoes.de: You could use a good man around here.
alteracoes.para: Você bem que precisa de um bom homem por aqui.

alteracoes.en: [Minutes pass as you finish your joke. With a nervous smile, you meet her eyes. She laughs.] I like you. You have proven you understand the Joke. You are now a Fool. Betray us and die.
alteracoes.de: [Minutes pass as you finish your joke. With a nervous smile, you meet her eyes. She laughs.] I like you. You have proven you understand the Joke. You are now a Fool. Betray us and die.
alteracoes.para: [Minutos se passam enquanto você termina sua piada. Com um sorriso nervoso, você encara os olhos dela. Ela ri.] Gostei de você. Você provou que entende a Piada. Agora você é um Tolo. Nos traia e morra.

alteracoes.en: There is only one thing that separates Scrapheap from the wasteland: the stench of Brahmin dung. But without that dung, there would be no power generator.
alteracoes.de: There is only one thing that separates Scrapheap from the wasteland: the stench of Brahmin dung. But without that dung, there would be no power generator.
alteracoes.para: Só uma coisa separa Scrapheap do ermo: o fedor de esterco de Brahmin. Mas sem esse esterco, não haveria gerador de energia.
Por que vocês não o controlam?

alteracoes.en: Because the Crypts do! They outnumber us for the moment, but if you were to join with us, we could take them.
alteracoes.de: Because the Crypts do! They outnumber us for the moment, but if you were to join with us, we could take them.
alteracoes.para: Porque os Crypts controlam! Eles nos superam em número por enquanto, mas se você se juntasse a nós, poderíamos derrotá-los.

alteracoes.en: You are a Fool. Did you think I would let you join that easy?
alteracoes.de: You are a Fool. Did you think I would let you join that easy?
alteracoes.para: Você é um Tolo. Achou que eu deixaria você entrar tão fácil?

alteracoes.en: Oh, ok. You're in. You are now a Fool. Betray us and die. Yadda-yadda-yadda.
alteracoes.de: Oh, ok. You're in. You are now a Fool. Betray us and die. Yadda-yadda-yadda.
alteracoes.para: Ah, tá. Você está dentro. Agora você é um Tolo. Nos traia e morra. Blá-blá-blá.

alteracoes.en: Well, how does it feel to be a Fool?
alteracoes.de: Well, how does it feel to be a Fool?
alteracoes.para: Bom, como é ser um Tolo?

alteracoes.en: Great! What do I do now?
alteracoes.de: Great! What do I do now?
alteracoes.para: Ótimo! O que eu faço agora?

alteracoes.en: How can I get some of that cool armor?
alteracoes.de: How can I get some of that cool armor?
alteracoes.para: Como consigo uma dessas armaduras maneiras?

alteracoes.en: You'd better. Not many can delve the humorous depths of full Fooldom.
alteracoes.de: You'd better. Not many can delve the humorous depths of full Fooldom.
alteracoes.para: É bom mesmo. Poucos conseguem mergulhar nas profundezas humorísticas da plena Tolice.

alteracoes.en: Uh, yes. Thanks. Uh, what next?
alteracoes.de: Uh, yes. Thanks. Uh, what next?
alteracoes.para: É, sim. Obrigado. É, e agora?

alteracoes.en: Hmm, yes. Good question. Well, I suppose we should plan our attack on the Crypts. We have to gain control of that power generator, or all is lost.
alteracoes.de: Hmm, yes. Good question. Well, I suppose we should plan our attack on the Crypts. We have to gain control of that power generator, or all is lost.
alteracoes.para: Hmm, sim. Boa pergunta. Bom, suponho que devamos planejar nosso ataque aos Crypts. Temos que assumir o controle daquele gerador de energia, ou tudo está perdido.

alteracoes.en: What do you want me to do?
alteracoes.de: What do you want me to do?
alteracoes.para: O que você quer que eu faça?

alteracoes.en: Well, since you are the newest member of the Fools, and therefore the most expendable, I want you to scout the enemy and report.
alteracoes.de: Well, since you are the newest member of the Fools, and therefore the most expendable, I want you to scout the enemy and report.
alteracoes.para: Bom, já que você é o membro mais novo dos Tolos, e portanto o mais descartável, quero que você espione o inimigo e reporte.

alteracoes.en: Then why do you bother me? Do your job and report back as soon as possible!
alteracoes.de: Then why do you bother me? Do your job and report back as soon as possible!
alteracoes.para: Então por que você me incomoda? Faça seu trabalho e reporte o mais rápido possível!

alteracoes.en: Excellent! Fools! We go to battle!
alteracoes.de: Excellent! Fools! We go to battle!

alteracoes.en: You are a Fool on double-secret probation.  You don't get Fool armor until you pass probation.
alteracoes.de: You are a Fool on double-secret probation.  You don't get Fool armor until you pass probation.
alteracoes.para: Você é um Tolo em liberdade condicional dupla-secreta. Você não ganha a armadura de Tolo até passar da condicional.

alteracoes.en: The Crypts shall be buried once more!
alteracoes.de: The Crypts shall be buried once more!
alteracoes.para: Os Crypts serão enterrados mais uma vez!

alteracoes.en: Who said you could come out of your graves? Return!
alteracoes.de: Who said you could come out of your graves? Return!
alteracoes.para: Quem disse que vocês podiam sair das suas covas? Voltem!

alteracoes.en: You lie! Go to your work before I open a can of whup-ass on you!
alteracoes.de: You lie! Go to your work before I open a can of whup-ass on you!
alteracoes.para: Você mente! Vá ao seu trabalho antes que eu abra uma lata de porrada em você!

alteracoes.en: Only the Foolish remain! Now I, Queen Baka, rule the Scrapheap.
alteracoes.de: Only the Foolish remain! Now I, Queen Baka, rule the Scrapheap.
alteracoes.para: Só os Tolos restam! Agora eu, Rainha Baka, governo o Scrapheap.

alteracoes.en: You shall be as if a Fool, but listen well and mark these words of mine: if you betray us as you would your former mates, then you shall die - with a grimace, not a laugh.
alteracoes.de: You shall be as if a Fool, but listen well and mark these words of mine: if you betray us as you would your former mates, then you shall die - with a grimace, not a laugh.
alteracoes.para: Você será como um Tolo, mas escute bem e marque estas minhas palavras: se você nos trair como trairia seus antigos companheiros, então morrerá - com uma careta, não com um riso.

alteracoes.en: And no, you shall not wear the mantle of a Fool.  You will wear the mantle of a traitor, and my garrot will be it's mate.
alteracoes.de: And no, you shall not wear the mantle of a Fool.  You will wear the mantle of a traitor, and my garrot will be it's mate.
alteracoes.para: E não, você não vestirá o manto de um Tolo. Você vestirá o manto de traidor, e meu garrote será seu par.

alteracoes.en: Yes, you can be the next jester in the Fool's court. Welcome to the Fools. Betray us and die.
alteracoes.de: Yes, you can be the next jester in the Fool's court. Welcome to the Fools. Betray us and die.
alteracoes.para: Sim, você pode ser o próximo bobo da corte dos Tolos. Bem-vindo aos Tolos. Nos traia e morra.

alteracoes.en: And without that power generator, there is no reason to be in this dunghole. The generator provides light, warmth and even some hair-raising experiences.
alteracoes.de: And without that power generator, there is no reason to be in this dunghole. The generator provides light, warmth and even some hair-raising experiences.
alteracoes.para: E sem aquele gerador de energia, não há motivo pra estar neste chiqueiro. O gerador fornece luz, calor e até algumas experiências de arrepiar.

alteracoes.en: Go gather some intelligence or something, and bring back news of the enemy. [She waves her hand in a dismissive gesture.]
alteracoes.de: Go gather some intelligence or something, and bring back news of the enemy. [She waves her hand in a dismissive gesture.]
alteracoes.para: Vá reunir informações ou algo assim, e traga notícias do inimigo. [Ela faz um gesto dispensando você com a mão.]

alteracoes.en: Gods of fortune, gods of fate. I care not as long as I get the last laugh. We can't join death so we laugh at it.
alteracoes.de: Gods of fortune, gods of fate. I care not as long as I get the last laugh. We can't join death so we laugh at it.
alteracoes.para: Deuses da fortuna, deuses do destino. Não me importo, contanto que eu dê a última risada. Não podemos nos juntar à morte, então rimos dela.

alteracoes.en: Phrax is not brave enough to speak this message with his own voice?  He is no man, of that I know.  And he sends you to say his words.  Well, then, say them and be done.
alteracoes.de: Phrax is not brave enough to speak this message with his own voice?  He is no man, of that I know.  And he sends you to say his words.  Well, then, say them and be done.
alteracoes.para: O Phrax não é corajoso o bastante pra dizer esta mensagem com a própria voz? Ele não é homem, disso eu sei. E manda você pra dizer as palavras dele. Bom, então, diga-as e acabe logo.

alteracoes.en: You see Zack Barstow, an Initiate of the Childred of the Cathedral.
alteracoes.de: You see Zack Barstow, an Initiate of the Childred of the Cathedral.
alteracoes.para: Você vê Zack Barstow, um Iniciado dos Filhos da Catedral.

alteracoes.en: Welcome to the Children of the Cathedral. How might I help you today?
alteracoes.de: Welcome to the Children of the Cathedral. How might I help you today?
alteracoes.para: Bem-vindo aos Filhos da Catedral. Como posso te ajudar hoje?

alteracoes.en: What is the meaning of the universe?
alteracoes.de: What is the meaning of the universe?
alteracoes.para: Qual é o sentido do universo?

alteracoes.en: I'm hurt pretty bad. Think you can help me?
alteracoes.de: I'm hurt pretty bad. Think you can help me?
alteracoes.para: Estou bem machucado. Acha que pode me ajudar?

alteracoes.en: How do you fix the water pump?
alteracoes.de: How do you fix the water pump?
alteracoes.para: Como se conserta a bomba d'água?

alteracoes.en: Can you tell me something about this place?
alteracoes.de: Can you tell me something about this place?
alteracoes.para: Você pode me contar algo sobre este lugar?

alteracoes.en: I am ill-suited for that. Perhaps if you talk to Laura, she will be willing give you the information you need to know.
alteracoes.de: I am ill-suited for that. Perhaps if you talk to Laura, she will be willing give you the information you need to know.
alteracoes.para: Sou inadequado pra isso. Talvez, se você falar com a Laura, ela esteja disposta a te dar a informação que você precisa saber.

alteracoes.en: Oh, fixing water pumps is easy. It's just a flag.
alteracoes.de: Oh, fixing water pumps is easy. It's just a flag.
alteracoes.para: Ah, consertar bombas d'água é fácil. É só uma flag.

alteracoes.en: I don't have the tools to assist you with that problem. Please talk to one of my superiors.
alteracoes.de: I don't have the tools to assist you with that problem. Please talk to one of my superiors.
alteracoes.para: Não tenho as ferramentas pra te ajudar com esse problema. Por favor, fale com um dos meus superiores.

alteracoes.en: Oh, that. That's just a flag.
alteracoes.de: Oh, that. That's just a flag.
alteracoes.para: Ah, isso. Isso é só uma flag.

alteracoes.en: Please consult with Laura. I have told you all I know.
alteracoes.de: Please consult with Laura. I have told you all I know.
alteracoes.para: Por favor, consulte a Laura. Já te disse tudo o que sei.

alteracoes.en: Thank you for destroying the radscorpions, stranger.
alteracoes.de: Thank you for destroying the radscorpions, stranger.
alteracoes.para: Obrigado por destruir os radscorpions, estranho.

alteracoes.en: I'm not going to talk to you unless you holster that weapon, stranger.
alteracoes.de: I'm not going to talk to you unless you holster that weapon, stranger.
alteracoes.para: Não vou falar com você a menos que guarde essa arma, estranho.

alteracoes.en: So, you've volunteered to help. Better than nothing, I reckon. Thanks. Gonna spread the word.
alteracoes.de: So, you've volunteered to help. Better than nothing, I reckon. Thanks. Gonna spread the word.
alteracoes.para: Então, você se ofereceu pra ajudar. Melhor que nada, eu acho. Obrigado. Vou espalhar a notícia.

alteracoes.en: Yeah, I'll go and see what I can do.
alteracoes.de: Yeah, I'll go and see what I can do.
alteracoes.para: É, vou lá ver o que consigo fazer.

alteracoes.en: Hey again. I heard you've actually helped us. You are more than worthy of our respect, indeed. We are free now. (You are now a member of the Blades gang.)
alteracoes.de: Hey again. I heard you've actually helped us. You are more than worthy of our respect, indeed. We are free now. (You are now a member of the Blades gang.)
alteracoes.para: Oi de novo. Ouvi dizer que você realmente nos ajudou. Você é mais que digno do nosso respeito, de fato. Estamos livres agora. (Você agora é membro da gangue das Lâminas.)

alteracoes.en: Can't help you with that. Go talk to Razor.
alteracoes.de: Can't help you with that. Go talk to Razor.
alteracoes.para: Não posso te ajudar com isso. Vá falar com o Razor.

alteracoes.en: I don't have that kind of money. I'm barely making ends meet as it is.
alteracoes.de: I don't have that kind of money. I'm barely making ends meet as it is.
alteracoes.para: Não tenho esse tanto de dinheiro. Mal consigo pagar minhas contas do jeito que está.

alteracoes.en: Thirty caps?! Are you kidding me?
alteracoes.de: Thirty caps?! Are you kidding me?
alteracoes.para: Trinta tampinhas?! Você está de brincadeira comigo?

alteracoes.en: Look asshole, you're the one who ruined my profit margins. So if you don't like my prices, fuck off. There's plenty of other iguana stands around here. Oh wait, there isn't. Asshole.
alteracoes.de: Look asshole, you're the one who ruined my profit margins. So if you don't like my prices, fuck off. There's plenty of other iguana stands around here. Oh wait, there isn't. Asshole.
alteracoes.para: Olha aqui, babaca, você foi quem arruinou minha margem de lucro. Então se você não gosta dos meus preços, cai fora. Tem um monte de outras bancas de iguana por aqui. Ah, espera, não tem. Babaca.

alteracoes.en: Terrible, thanks to you. Now, if you ain't here to buy anything, get out of my face.
alteracoes.de: Terrible, thanks to you. Now, if you ain't here to buy anything, get out of my face.
alteracoes.para: Terrível, graças a você. Agora, se você não está aqui pra comprar nada, some da minha frente.

alteracoes.en: Actually, come to think of it, I am pretty hungry.
alteracoes.de: Actually, come to think of it, I am pretty hungry.
alteracoes.para: Na verdade, pensando bem, estou com bastante fome.

alteracoes.en: experience for blackmailing Bob into paying for your silence.
alteracoes.de: experience for blackmailing Bob into paying for your silence.
alteracoes.para: de experiência por chantagear o Bob a pagar pelo seu silêncio.

alteracoes.en: What the hell are you doing here? You shut down my business and got a big fat reward I'm sure. So you're just here to gloat or what?
alteracoes.de: What the hell are you doing here? You shut down my business and got a big fat reward I'm sure. So you're just here to gloat or what?
alteracoes.para: O que diabos você está fazendo aqui? Você fechou meu negócio e ganhou uma bela recompensa gorda, tenho certeza. Então você só veio se gabar ou o quê?

alteracoes.en: Pretty much, yeah. How's business, Bob?
alteracoes.de: Pretty much, yeah. How's business, Bob?
alteracoes.para: Basicamente, sim. Como vão os negócios, Bob?

alteracoes.en: Nah, just checking to see how you're doing.
alteracoes.de: Nah, just checking to see how you're doing.
alteracoes.para: Nah, só vim ver como você está.

alteracoes.en: Terrible, thanks to you. They might let me die in here for all I know.
alteracoes.de: Terrible, thanks to you. They might let me die in here for all I know.
alteracoes.para: Terrível, graças a você. Podem até me deixar morrer aqui, sei lá.

alteracoes.en: I could have them kill you right now, if you prefer that over waiting.
alteracoes.de: I could have them kill you right now, if you prefer that over waiting.
alteracoes.para: Eu poderia mandar te matarem agora mesmo, se você prefere isso a esperar.

alteracoes.en: I'll ask them if we can turn you into Iguana Bits after your execution!

alteracoes.en: With the generator broken, there is little reason for the gangs to fight over Scrapheap. Your job here is done, but your mission to find the water purification chip continues.

The people of Scrapheap will lead a poorer life without their power; but with the gangs gone, at least they will have a life. Your job here is done, but your mission to find the water purification chip continues.
alteracoes.para: Com o gerador quebrado, há pouco motivo pras gangues brigarem por Scrapheap. O povo de Scrapheap terá uma vida mais pobre sem energia; mas, com as gangues eliminadas, ao menos terão uma vida. Seu trabalho aqui está concluído, mas sua missão de encontrar o chip de purificação de água continua.

alteracoes.en: After a long battle and much bloodshed, you prevail. With the gangs defeated, Scrapheap is a safe haven once again. The townspeople are grateful - They give you some valuable information, and your task in Scrapheap is now complete. However, the mission to find the water purification chip continues.
alteracoes.de: After a long battle and much bloodshed, you prevail. With the gangs defeated, Scrapheap is a safe haven once again. The townspeople are grateful - They give you some valuable information, and your task in Scrapheap is now complete. However, the mission to find the water purification chip continues.
alteracoes.para: Após uma longa batalha e muito derramamento de sangue, você prevalece. Com as gangues derrotadas, Scrapheap é um refúgio seguro mais uma vez. Os moradores estão gratos - eles te dão informações valiosas, e sua tarefa em Scrapheap está concluída. Porém, a missão de encontrar o chip de purificação de água continua.

alteracoes.en: 500 After stopping the Master and his lab with which he was creating his army of Super Mutants, you return home, only to discover that you are thrown out of your Vault for being too destructive. Thank you for playing Fallout.

alteracoes.en: 502 After destroying the Vats, the Master, and his army of Super Mutants, you return home, but are forbidden from entering. You retaliate, leaving the shattered corpse of the Overseer behind you. Thank you for playing Fallout.

alteracoes.en: 503 You are dipped in FEV and join the Master's Unity, revealing the location of Vault 13. You are rewarded with leading the assault against your Vault, killing the Overseer with your bare fists. Thank you for playing Fallout.

alteracoes.para: Mais alguém que eu deva conhecer?

alteracoes.en: Well, there are also the Fools. They would control Scrapheap, if the Crypts were gone. The two gangs fight over who controls this place. Currently, the Crypts are on top. Now that you are here, things could change.
alteracoes.de: Well, there are also the Fools. They would control Scrapheap, if the Crypts were gone. The two gangs fight over who controls this place. Currently, the Crypts are on top. Now that you are here, things could change.
alteracoes.para: Bom, também há os Tolos. Eles controlariam Scrapheap, se os Crypts sumissem. As duas gangues brigam por quem controla este lugar. Atualmente, os Crypts estão por cima. Agora que você chegou, as coisas podem mudar.
O que te faz dizer isso?

alteracoes.en: If you could get rid of the gangs, we would be grateful. We don't have the numbers or the strength to drive them off, and few people care about this place. If you care, then we might be able to help you.
alteracoes.de: If you could get rid of the gangs, we would be grateful. We don't have the numbers or the strength to drive them off, and few people care about this place. If you care, then we might be able to help you.
alteracoes.para: Se você conseguisse se livrar das gangues, ficaríamos gratos. Não temos o número nem a força pra expulsá-los, e poucos se importam com este lugar. Se você se importa, então talvez possamos ajudar você.

alteracoes.en: I've heard of you. You want to find the lost city of Necropolis. A grateful people could provide information on where to go.
alteracoes.de: I've heard of you. You want to find the lost city of Necropolis. A grateful people could provide information on where to go.
alteracoes.para: Já ouvi falar de você. Você quer encontrar a cidade perdida de Necropolis. Um povo grato poderia fornecer informação sobre pra onde ir.

alteracoes.en: We could ask for nothing more.
alteracoes.de: We could ask for nothing more.
alteracoes.para: Não poderíamos pedir mais que isso.

alteracoes.en: Why should you not? I have the best interests of my people at heart, and I would like to see you come to no harm.
alteracoes.de: Why should you not? I have the best interests of my people at heart, and I would like to see you come to no harm.
alteracoes.para: E por que não deveria? Tenho o bem-estar do meu povo no coração, e gostaria de ver você sair ileso.

alteracoes.en: There are forces at work here in Scrapheap that would like to use you, and if that is not possible, to see you dead and buried. Choose your friends wisely, and your enemies with even more care. Good day.
alteracoes.de: There are forces at work here in Scrapheap that would like to use you, and if that is not possible, to see you dead and buried. Choose your friends wisely, and your enemies with even more care. Good day.
alteracoes.para: Há forças agindo aqui em Scrapheap que gostariam de te usar, e, se isso não for possível, de te ver morto e enterrado. Escolha seus amigos com sabedoria, e seus inimigos com ainda mais cuidado. Bom dia.

alteracoes.en: We thank you for getting rid of the Crypts and the Fools. Without the power generator, my people will have a poor life. Do you think you could fix it?
alteracoes.de: We thank you for getting rid of the Crypts and the Fools. Without the power generator, my people will have a poor life. Do you think you could fix it?
alteracoes.para: Agradecemos por se livrar dos Crypts e dos Tolos. Sem o gerador de energia, meu povo terá uma vida pobre. Você acha que conseguiria consertá-lo?

alteracoes.en: Fix it yourself. I want my reward.
alteracoes.de: Fix it yourself. I want my reward.
alteracoes.para: Conserte você mesmo. Quero minha recompensa.

alteracoes.en: Very well, you shall have it. You have cast my people into a cold night and then abandoned us to the wolves - but I understand that your quest is more important.
alteracoes.de: Very well, you shall have it. You have cast my people into a cold night and then abandoned us to the wolves - but I understand that your quest is more important.
alteracoes.para: Muito bem, você a terá. Você lançou meu povo numa noite fria e então nos abandonou aos lobos - mas entendo que sua missão é mais importante.

alteracoes.en: The violence you have started may lead straight back to my people. Please finish it.
alteracoes.de: The violence you have started may lead straight back to my people. Please finish it.
alteracoes.para: A violência que você começou pode voltar direto pro meu povo. Por favor, termine o que começou.

alteracoes.en: Just like you cowards to lay the task of death on the shoulders of others.
alteracoes.de: Just like you cowards to lay the task of death on the shoulders of others.
alteracoes.para: Típico de covardes como você jogar a tarefa da morte nos ombros dos outros.

alteracoes.en: If you need help, I will provide it, but don't ask my people. They are too tired of death and pain. I will join you, if that is what you wish.
alteracoes.de: If you need help, I will provide it, but don't ask my people. They are too tired of death and pain. I will join you, if that is what you wish.
alteracoes.para: Se você precisar de ajuda, eu forneço, mas não peça ao meu povo. Estão cansados demais de morte e dor. Vou me juntar a você, se é o que você deseja.

alteracoes.en: Yes, follow me, and attack when I do.
alteracoes.de: Yes, follow me, and attack when I do.
alteracoes.para: Sim, me siga e ataque quando eu atacar.

alteracoes.en: No. I'm just making a social comment.
alteracoes.de: No. I'm just making a social comment.
alteracoes.para: Não. Só estou fazendo um comentário social.

alteracoes.en: Just as I suspected, you don't care about anything except your own needs. Join our enemies, bring fear to my people, and betray your own background.
alteracoes.de: Just as I suspected, you don't care about anything except your own needs. Join our enemies, bring fear to my people, and betray your own background.
alteracoes.para: Bem como eu suspeitava, você não se importa com nada além das próprias necessidades. Junte-se aos nossos inimigos, traga medo ao meu povo e traia sua própria origem.

alteracoes.en: I'm going to kill you for saying that.
alteracoes.de: I'm going to kill you for saying that.
alteracoes.para: Vou te matar por dizer isso.

alteracoes.en: It's a plan. I'm infiltrating this gang.
alteracoes.de: It's a plan. I'm infiltrating this gang.
alteracoes.para: É um plano. Estou me infiltrando nesta gangue.

alteracoes.en: I thought you would, you worm.
alteracoes.de: I thought you would, you worm.
alteracoes.para: Eu sabia que você faria, seu verme.

alteracoes.en: Perhaps, but actions speak louder than words.
alteracoes.de: Perhaps, but actions speak louder than words.
alteracoes.para: Talvez, mas ações falam mais alto que palavras.

alteracoes.en: What can I help you with?
alteracoes.de: What can I help you with?

alteracoes.en: Tell me about the power generator.
alteracoes.de: Tell me about the power generator.
alteracoes.para: Me fale sobre o gerador de energia.

alteracoes.en: Scrapheap is our town. It was our home. And it will be again, hopefully.
alteracoes.de: Scrapheap is our town. It was our home. And it will be again, hopefully.
alteracoes.para: Scrapheap é a nossa cidade. Era o nosso lar. E voltará a ser, com sorte.

alteracoes.en: The power generator supplies all the electicity in town. Without it, we would surely die. It is the most important thing in town. Whoever controls it, controls Scrapheap.
alteracoes.de: The power generator supplies all the electicity in town. Without it, we would surely die. It is the most important thing in town. Whoever controls it, controls Scrapheap.
alteracoes.para: O gerador de energia fornece toda a eletricidade da cidade. Sem ele, com certeza morreríamos. É a coisa mais importante da cidade. Quem o controla, controla Scrapheap.

alteracoes.en: The Crypts are a gang run by Rayze. He's an animal and has one of the largest guns I've ever seen. He lets Lenny live, cuz he takes care of the brahmin, which provide fuel for the generator. The Crypts are in the big house.
alteracoes.de: The Crypts are a gang run by Rayze. He's an animal and has one of the largest guns I've ever seen. He lets Lenny live, cuz he takes care of the brahmin, which provide fuel for the generator. The Crypts are in the big house.
alteracoes.para: Os Crypts são uma gangue comandada pelo Rayze. Ele é um animal e tem uma das maiores armas que eu já vi. Ele deixa o Lenny viver porque ele cuida dos brahmin, que fornecem combustível pro gerador. Os Crypts ficam na casa grande.

alteracoes.en: Baka leads the Fools. If she had any more men, she'd surely attack the Crypts and try to take back the power generator. You can tell the Crypts from the Fools by their armor. Fools wear metal, Crypts leather.
alteracoes.de: Baka leads the Fools. If she had any more men, she'd surely attack the Crypts and try to take back the power generator. You can tell the Crypts from the Fools by their armor. Fools wear metal, Crypts leather.
alteracoes.para: A Baka lidera os Tolos. Se ela tivesse mais homens, com certeza atacaria os Crypts e tentaria retomar o gerador de energia. Dá pra diferenciar os Crypts dos Tolos pela armadura. Tolos usam metal, Crypts usam couro.

alteracoes.en: Thank you for fixing the water pump.
alteracoes.de: Thank you for fixing the water pump.
alteracoes.para: Obrigado por consertar a bomba d'água.

alteracoes.en: You notice the disk has a faded and worn label that reads "Alpha Experiments Log".
alteracoes.de: You notice the disk has a faded and worn label that reads "Alpha Experiments Log".
alteracoes.para: Você nota que o disco tem um rótulo apagado e gasto que diz "Registro dos Experimentos Alfa".
Você vê: Disco dos Experimentos Alfa.

alteracoes.en: You notice the disk has a faded and worn label that reads "Delta Experiments Log".
alteracoes.de: You notice the disk has a faded and worn label that reads "Delta Experiments Log".
alteracoes.para: Você nota que o disco tem um rótulo apagado e gasto que diz "Registro dos Experimentos Delta".
Você vê: Disco dos Experimentos Delta.

alteracoes.en: The Military has deemed it necessary for us to research further in-depth the effects of wave technology upon living organisms. We have taken light and sound as the basis of our studies. By manipulating the amplitude of the light waves and magnifying the frequency, we have been able to get lasers which will cut through a few feet of steel. Unfortunately, the power to do such a task has not been fully developed. We have other scientists looking into this.
alteracoes.de: The Military has deemed it necessary for us to research further in-depth the effects of wave technology upon living organisms. We have taken light and sound as the basis of our studies. By manipulating the amplitude of the light waves and magnifying the frequency, we have been able to get lasers which will cut through a few feet of steel. Unfortunately, the power to do such a task has not been fully developed. We have other scientists looking into this.
alteracoes.para: Os Militares consideraram necessário que pesquisássemos mais a fundo os efeitos da tecnologia de ondas sobre organismos vivos. Tomamos a luz e o som como base dos nossos estudos. Manipulando a amplitude das ondas de luz e ampliando a frequência, conseguimos lasers que cortam alguns metros de aço. Infelizmente, a energia pra realizar tal tarefa ainda não foi totalmente desenvolvida. Temos outros cientistas investigando isso.

alteracoes.en: I think we have to talk about our distance.
alteracoes.de: I think we have to talk about our distance.
alteracoes.para: Acho que a gente tem que falar sobre nossa distância.

alteracoes.en: Actually you're at a good distance for now.
alteracoes.de: Actually you're at a good distance for now.
alteracoes.para: Na verdade, você está numa boa distância por enquanto.

alteracoes.en: What is that? You don't like so much company, huh?
alteracoes.de: What is that? You don't like so much company, huh?
alteracoes.para: O que foi? Você não gosta de tanta companhia, hein?

alteracoes.en: You see a holodisk in very poor condition.
alteracoes.de: You see a holodisk in very poor condition.
alteracoes.para: Você vê um holodisco em péssimo estado.

alteracoes.en: Great. Go take it to Razor.
alteracoes.de: Great. Go take it to Razor.

alteracoes.en: Oh, sorry. I didn't realize you're an idiot.
alteracoes.de: Oh, sorry. I didn't realize you're an idiot.
alteracoes.para: Ah, desculpa. Não tinha percebido que você é um idiota.

alteracoes.en: You see Dumar, an Acrolyte of the Children of the Cathedral.
alteracoes.de: You see Dumar, an Acrolyte of the Children of the Cathedral.
alteracoes.para: Você vê Dumar, um Acólito dos Filhos da Catedral.

alteracoes.en: Greetings traveler. We have heard tales of one who traverses the Wasteland. How might we be of service to you today?
alteracoes.de: Greetings traveler. We have heard tales of one who traverses the Wasteland. How might we be of service to you today?
alteracoes.para: Saudações, viajante. Ouvimos histórias de alguém que percorre o Ermo. Como podemos ser úteis a você hoje?

alteracoes.en: The Wasteland is a rough place. I have been injured pretty bad. Can you you help me out with that?
alteracoes.de: The Wasteland is a rough place. I have been injured pretty bad. Can you you help me out with that?
alteracoes.para: O Ermo é um lugar difícil. Fiquei bem ferido. Você pode me ajudar com isso?

alteracoes.en: I want you and your kind slaughtered!
alteracoes.de: I want you and your kind slaughtered!
alteracoes.para: Quero você e os do seu tipo massacrados!

alteracoes.en: Huh? Can't hear you. Can you speak up please?
alteracoes.de: Huh? Can't hear you. Can you speak up please?
alteracoes.para: Hã? Não consigo te ouvir. Você pode falar mais alto, por favor?

alteracoes.en: Who might I consult in order to become a member of this establishment?
alteracoes.de: Who might I consult in order to become a member of this establishment?
alteracoes.para: Quem eu poderia consultar pra me tornar membro deste estabelecimento?

alteracoes.en: I wish to comprehend the wisdom upon which you and your fellow followers have based this establishment of beliefs.
alteracoes.de: I wish to comprehend the wisdom upon which you and your fellow followers have based this establishment of beliefs.
alteracoes.para: Desejo compreender a sabedoria na qual você e seus companheiros seguidores basearam este estabelecimento de crenças.

alteracoes.en: I'm sorry, but I am a bit too busy at the moment to relate the entire tale of the Children of the Cathedral. They are having me clean off the pews. Talk to Laura if you need information.
alteracoes.de: I'm sorry, but I am a bit too busy at the moment to relate the entire tale of the Children of the Cathedral. They are having me clean off the pews. Talk to Laura if you need information.
alteracoes.para: Sinto muito, mas estou um pouco ocupado demais no momento pra contar a história inteira dos Filhos da Catedral. Estão me fazendo limpar os bancos. Fale com a Laura se você precisar de informação.

alteracoes.en: I am sorry, but your words are far to above me to understand what you said. Perhaps our wiser followers, like Laura, might be able to help you better than I.
alteracoes.de: I am sorry, but your words are far to above me to understand what you said. Perhaps our wiser followers, like Laura, might be able to help you better than I.
alteracoes.para: Sinto muito, mas suas palavras estão muito além de mim pra entender o que você disse. Talvez nossos seguidores mais sábios, como a Laura, possam te ajudar melhor que eu.

alteracoes.en: I am truly sorry to hear about your ailment. Alas, I am merely an acrolyte and am unable to assist with your healing. Only the full members are granted training in the healing arts.
alteracoes.de: I am truly sorry to hear about your ailment. Alas, I am merely an acrolyte and am unable to assist with your healing. Only the full members are granted training in the healing arts.
alteracoes.para: Lamento de verdade ouvir sobre a sua enfermidade. Infelizmente, sou apenas um acólito e não posso auxiliar na sua cura. Só os membros plenos recebem treinamento nas artes da cura.

alteracoes.en: Ah, child, it seems that you and I are speaking at different levels. Maybe if you talk to Laura, she can help you better than I can. Peace with you child.
alteracoes.de: Ah, child, it seems that you and I are speaking at different levels. Maybe if you talk to Laura, she can help you better than I can. Peace with you child.
alteracoes.para: Ah, criança, parece que você e eu falamos em níveis diferentes. Talvez, se você falar com a Laura, ela possa te ajudar melhor que eu. A paz esteja com você, criança.

alteracoes.en: Please talk to Laura. She can help you better than I can.
alteracoes.de: Please talk to Laura. She can help you better than I can.
alteracoes.para: Por favor, fale com a Laura. Ela pode te ajudar melhor que eu.

alteracoes.en: We are really a peaceful people. Please do not shed blood within this holy place.
alteracoes.de: We are really a peaceful people. Please do not shed blood within this holy place.
alteracoes.para: Somos realmente um povo pacífico. Por favor, não derrame sangue dentro deste lugar sagrado.

alteracoes.en: Once upon a time, there was a little traveller who walked around the world. He walked up to a young lady named Laura and asked her to tell him a story. The end.
alteracoes.de: Once upon a time, there was a little traveller who walked around the world. He walked up to a young lady named Laura and asked her to tell him a story. The end.
alteracoes.para: Era uma vez um pequeno viajante que caminhava pelo mundo. Ele foi até uma jovem chamada Laura e pediu que ela lhe contasse uma história. Fim.

alteracoes.en: Dumar pleads with you to cease your vicious attacks.
alteracoes.de: Dumar pleads with you to cease your vicious attacks.
alteracoes.para: Dumar implora que você cesse seus ataques cruéis.

alteracoes.en: You see a Super Mutant centaur handler.
alteracoes.de: You see a Super Mutant centaur handler.
alteracoes.para: Você vê um tratador de centauro Super Mutante.

alteracoes.en: You be going! No reason for here.
alteracoes.de: You be going! No reason for here.
alteracoes.para: Ocê ir embora! Num tem motivo pra aqui.

alteracoes.en: He looks to be an experienced hunter.
alteracoes.de: He looks to be an experienced hunter.
alteracoes.para: Ele parece ser um caçador experiente.

alteracoes.en: experience points for learning how to skin geckos.
alteracoes.de: experience points for learning how to skin geckos.
alteracoes.para: pontos de experiência por aprender a esfolar geckos.

alteracoes.en: We do not have time for you. Please be on your way now.
alteracoes.de: We do not have time for you. Please be on your way now.
alteracoes.para: Não temos tempo pra você. Por favor, siga seu caminho agora.

alteracoes.en: I'm sorry, but we don't have the time and pelts to go through this again.
alteracoes.de: I'm sorry, but we don't have the time and pelts to go through this again.
alteracoes.para: Sinto muito, mas não temos tempo nem peles pra passar por isso de novo.

alteracoes.en: You will pay for what you have done!
alteracoes.de: You will pay for what you have done!
alteracoes.para: Você vai pagar pelo que fez!

alteracoes.en: Holster your weapon, then we can talk.
alteracoes.de: Holster your weapon, then we can talk.
alteracoes.para: Guarde sua arma, então podemos conversar.

alteracoes.en: Greetings, traveler. What can we do for you?
alteracoes.de: Greetings, traveler. What can we do for you?
alteracoes.para: Saudações, viajante. O que podemos fazer por você?

alteracoes.en: What can we do for you?
alteracoes.de: What can we do for you?
alteracoes.para: O que podemos fazer por você?
O que você está fazendo aqui?

alteracoes.en: I am Irataba, and this is my son Cairook.
alteracoes.de: I am Irataba, and this is my son Cairook.
alteracoes.para: Sou Irataba, e este é meu filho Cairook.

alteracoes.en: . It is nice to meet you and your son.
alteracoes.de: . It is nice to meet you and your son.
alteracoes.para: . É um prazer conhecer você e seu filho.
O que você está fazendo aqui?

alteracoes.en: Our village is not too far from here. No offense, but I'd rather not tell you where exactly it is.
alteracoes.de: Our village is not too far from here. No offense, but I'd rather not tell you where exactly it is.
alteracoes.para: Nossa vila não fica muito longe daqui. Sem ofensa, mas prefiro não te dizer onde exatamente ela fica.

alteracoes.en: Shame, I wanted to slaughter the whole lot of you.
alteracoes.de: Shame, I wanted to slaughter the whole lot of you.
alteracoes.para: Que pena, eu queria massacrar vocês todos.

alteracoes.en: Thank you. It is nice to meet a friendly face for once.
alteracoes.de: Thank you. It is nice to meet a friendly face for once.
alteracoes.para: Obrigado. É bom encontrar um rosto amigável, pra variar.

alteracoes.en: Would you like to join us? I am showing my son how to skin a gecko.
alteracoes.de: Would you like to join us? I am showing my son how to skin a gecko.
alteracoes.para: Você gostaria de se juntar a nós? Estou ensinando meu filho a esfolar um gecko.

alteracoes.en: I don't have time for that right now, but thanks.
alteracoes.de: I don't have time for that right now, but thanks.
alteracoes.para: Não tenho tempo pra isso agora, mas obrigado.

alteracoes.en: So be it. Safe travels, stranger.
alteracoes.de: So be it. Safe travels, stranger.
alteracoes.para: Que assim seja. Boa viagem, estranho.

alteracoes.en: We were hunting geckos and now I am showing my son how to skin them.
alteracoes.de: We were hunting geckos and now I am showing my son how to skin them.
alteracoes.para: Estávamos caçando geckos e agora estou ensinando meu filho a esfolá-los.

alteracoes.en: Interesting. Can you show me how to skin a gecko?
alteracoes.de: Interesting. Can you show me how to skin a gecko?
alteracoes.para: Interessante. Você pode me ensinar a esfolar um gecko?

alteracoes.en: If your offer still stands, can you show me how to skin a gecko?
alteracoes.de: If your offer still stands, can you show me how to skin a gecko?
alteracoes.para: Se sua oferta ainda vale, você pode me ensinar a esfolar um gecko?

alteracoes.en: I do not have the time to teach you, traveler.
alteracoes.de: I do not have the time to teach you, traveler.
alteracoes.para: Não tenho tempo pra te ensinar, viajante.

alteracoes.en: Very well. Sit down, take this knife and watch me ... [You watch and learn]
alteracoes.de: Very well. Sit down, take this knife and watch me ... [You watch and learn]
alteracoes.para: Muito bem. Sente-se, pegue esta faca e me observe... [Você observa e aprende]

alteracoes.en: ... Yes, that's it. It appears you've got the hang of it. Now if you practice some more and hone your skills, you might one day be as good as I am.
alteracoes.de: ... Yes, that's it. It appears you've got the hang of it. Now if you practice some more and hone your skills, you might one day be as good as I am.
alteracoes.para: ... Sim, é isso. Parece que você pegou o jeito. Agora, se praticar mais e afiar suas habilidades, talvez um dia seja tão bom quanto eu.

alteracoes.en: Thanks for showing me how to do that, Irataba. I think I'll go practice on some geckos. Goodbye.
alteracoes.de: Thanks for showing me how to do that, Irataba. I think I'll go practice on some geckos. Goodbye.
alteracoes.para: Obrigado por me ensinar isso, Irataba. Acho que vou praticar em alguns geckos. Adeus.

alteracoes.en: ... No, not like that. You see this cut here? You ruined the skin and it became worthless.
alteracoes.de: ... No, not like that. You see this cut here? You ruined the skin and it became worthless.
alteracoes.para: ... Não, não é assim. Está vendo este corte aqui? Você estragou a pele e ela ficou inútil.

alteracoes.en: Don't worry, this skin wasn't much worth to begin with. But you must practice more the ways of the outdoorsman. For now I don't think I can help you.
alteracoes.de: Don't worry, this skin wasn't much worth to begin with. But you must practice more the ways of the outdoorsman. For now I don't think I can help you.
alteracoes.para: Não se preocupe, esta pele não valia muito pra começo de conversa. Mas você precisa praticar mais os caminhos do homem do campo. Por ora, não acho que posso ajudar você.

alteracoes.en: Uh, okay. I will practice some more then. Goodbye.
alteracoes.de: Uh, okay. I will practice some more then. Goodbye.
alteracoes.para: É, tá bom. Vou praticar mais então. Adeus.
Um tribal em busca de vingança!

alteracoes.en: Your attempt to re-wire the field emitter fails.
alteracoes.de: Your attempt to re-wire the field emitter fails.
alteracoes.para: Sua tentativa de re-grampear o emissor de força falha.

alteracoes.en: You turn off the field emitter.
alteracoes.de: You turn off the field emitter.
alteracoes.para: Você desliga o emissor de força.

alteracoes.en: You see a horribly-damaged field emitter.
alteracoes.de: You see a horribly-damaged field emitter.
alteracoes.para: Você um campo emissor horrivelmente danificado.

alteracoes.en: The emitter is too damaged to use.
alteracoes.de: The emitter is too damaged to use.
alteracoes.para: O emissor esta muito danificado para usar.

alteracoes.en: The emitter is too damaged to repair.
alteracoes.de: The emitter is too damaged to repair.
alteracoes.para: O emissor esta muito danificado para reparar.

alteracoes.en: You notice that the field is damaged enough to walk through.
alteracoes.de: You notice that the field is damaged enough to walk through.
alteracoes.para: Você nota que o campo esta danificado o bastante para caminhar atraves dele.

alteracoes.en: A well-placed explosive blast might knock out the emitter completely.
alteracoes.de: A well-placed explosive blast might knock out the emitter completely.
alteracoes.para: Uma explosão bem posicionada poderia desativar o emissor completamente.

alteracoes.en: You don't see any way to attach the explosives to the emitter. You will will have place them nearby it.
alteracoes.de: You don't see any way to attach the explosives to the emitter. You will will have place them nearby it.
alteracoes.para: Você não vê como prender os explosivos ao emissor. Você vai ter que colocá-los perto dele.

alteracoes.en: You fail to do any damage to the emitter.

alteracoes.en: Well, your story checks out. Damn. Bob always seemed a little "off" but I'd never have suspected he was selling human flesh to us. I was having one or two of those for lunch every day!
alteracoes.de: Well, your story checks out. Damn. Bob always seemed a little "off" but I'd never have suspected he was selling human flesh to us. I was having one or two of those for lunch every day!
alteracoes.para: Bom, sua história confere. Droga. O Bob sempre pareceu meio "esquisito", mas eu nunca teria suspeitado que ele estava vendendo carne humana pra gente. Eu comia um ou dois desses no almoço todo dia!

alteracoes.en: I know. It's a shame, considering how delicious they are.
alteracoes.de: I know. It's a shame, considering how delicious they are.

alteracoes.de: Thank you. Have a nice day!

They do? I hadn't noticed. I guess I've been hanging around them

NO! No! I'm not a slaver, like some of these people. How could you sell

NO! No! I'm not a slaver, like some of these people. How could you sell

Oh, I understand. You don't realize how important Brahmin are to me.

Oh. Oh, I get it. Hey, you're kinda nice. I like you. I should warn

The bad people. They fight over things. Things I don't understand.

 I don't like them.

The bad people. They fight over things. Things I don't understand.

alteracoes.de: I want to know about the power generator.

I don't like the Fools, they're always picking on me. They live in the
 garage to the north. They fight the Crypts, but we all lose.

I don't like the Fools, they're always picking on me. They live in the

The Crypts are really mean. They hold the 'lectricity and if we are

 Worse than they hate my friends.

The Crypts are really mean. They hold the 'lectricity and if we are

It feeds the lights. It makes all the stuff go. I don't know, but

It feeds the lights. It makes all the stuff go. I don't know, but

I'm spending some time with my friends. I spend a lot of time with them.

I'm spending some time with my friends. I spend a lot of time with them.
 They're nice. They don't treat me bad. Not like some people.
 [Lenny squints his eyes.] I hate some people. I hate the Fools.

Oh, sorry. Lex says I scare him, too. I don't mean it. And I never scare

Oh, sorry. Lex says I scare him, too. I don't mean it. And I never scare
 my friend.

alteracoes.en: Now, that wasn't so difficult, was it? What are your friends?

Lex is nice. Lex treats my friends like family. About once a month,

Lex is nice. Lex treats my friends like family. About once a month,

alteracoes.para: O Lex é legal. O Lex trata meus amigos como família. Uma vez por mês, ele até leva um dos meus amigos pra casa pro jantar. [Lenny sorri.] Aí ele deixa eles brincarem com um monte de Brahmin do céu. Não é legal?

alteracoes.en: Yes, Lenny, it's very nice. Now tell me about your friends.

alteracoes.de: Lenny, I think you need to know something. Lex eats your friends.
alteracoes.para: Lenny, acho que você precisa saber de uma coisa. O Lex come seus amigos.

alteracoes.en:
No, you lie! You are a liar! Lex would never do that! You stinking
 liar! I'm going to hurt you for saying that in front of my friends.
alteracoes.de:
No, you lie! You are a liar! Lex would never do that! You stinking
 liar! I'm going to hurt you for saying that in front of my friends.
alteracoes.para: Não, você mente! Você é um mentiroso! O Lex nunca faria isso! Seu mentiroso fedorento! Vou te machucar por dizer isso na frente dos meus amigos.

alteracoes.en: [Lex whispers.] Best be careful. Rock doesn't always tell the truth.
alteracoes.de: [Lex whispers.] Best be careful. Rock doesn't always tell the truth.
alteracoes.para: [Lex sussurra.] Melhor tomar cuidado. O Rock nem sempre diz a verdade.
Por que eu deveria confiar em você?

alteracoes.en:
Rock is a member of the Crypts, a gang. He tries to get strangers, like
 yourself, into trouble. If you listen to him, you could find yourself dead
 and buried.
alteracoes.de:
Rock is a member of the Crypts, a gang. He tries to get strangers, like
 yourself, into trouble. If you listen to him, you could find yourself dead
 and buried.
alteracoes.para: O Rock é membro dos Crypts, uma gangue. Ele tenta meter estranhos, como você, em encrenca. Se você o ouvir, pode acabar morto e enterrado.

alteracoes.en: Thanks for the info. Have a good day.
alteracoes.de: Thanks for the info. Have a good day.
alteracoes.para: Obrigado pela informação. Tenha um bom dia.

alteracoes.en: I'm Lex. Scrapheap is my home, and I guess I speak for her people.
alteracoes.de: I'm Lex. Scrapheap is my home, and I guess I speak for her people.
alteracoes.para: Sou o Lex. Scrapheap é meu lar, e acho que falo pelo povo dela.

alteracoes.en: Anyone else I should know about?
alteracoes.de: Anyone else I should know about?
alteracoes.para: Mais alguém que eu deva conhecer?

alteracoes.en:
Well, there are also the Fools. They would control Scrapheap, if the
 Crypts were gone. The two gangs fight over who controls this place.
 Currently, the Crypts are on top. Now that you are here, things could change.
alteracoes.de:
Well, there are also the Fools. They would control Scrapheap, if the
 Crypts were gone. The two gangs fight over who controls this place.
 Currently, the Crypts are on top. Now that you are here, things could change.
alteracoes.para: Bom, também há os Tolos. Eles controlariam Scrapheap, se os Crypts sumissem. As duas gangues brigam por quem controla este lugar. Atualmente, os Crypts estão por cima. Agora que você chegou, as coisas podem mudar.
O que te faz dizer isso?

alteracoes.en:
If you could get rid of the gangs, we would be grateful. We don't have
 the numbers or the strength to drive them off, and few people care about
 this place. If you care, then we might be able to help you.
alteracoes.de:
If you could get rid of the gangs, we would be grateful. We don't have
 the numbers or the strength to drive them off, and few people care about
 this place. If you care, then we might be able to help you.
alteracoes.para: Se você conseguisse se livrar das gangues, ficaríamos gratos. Não temos o número nem a força pra expulsá-los, e poucos se importam com este lugar. Se você se importa, então talvez possamos ajudar você.

alteracoes.en:
I've heard of you. You want to find the lost city of Necropolis.
 A grateful people could provide information on where to go.
alteracoes.de:
I've heard of you. You want to find the lost city of Necropolis.
 A grateful people could provide information on where to go.
alteracoes.para: Já ouvi falar de você. Você quer encontrar a cidade perdida de Necropolis. Um povo grato poderia fornecer informação sobre pra onde ir.

alteracoes.en: We could ask for nothing more.
alteracoes.de: We could ask for nothing more.
alteracoes.para: Não poderíamos pedir mais que isso.

alteracoes.en:
Why should you not? I have the best interests of my people at heart,
 and I would like to see you come to no harm.
alteracoes.de:
Why should you not? I have the best interests of my people at heart,
 and I would like to see you come to no harm.
alteracoes.para: E por que não deveria? Tenho o bem-estar do meu povo no coração, e gostaria de ver você sair ileso.

alteracoes.en:
There are forces at work here in Scrapheap that would like to use you,
 and if that is not possible, to see you dead and buried. Choose your friends
 wisely, and your enemies with even more care. Good day.
alteracoes.de:
There are forces at work here in Scrapheap that would like to use you,
 and if that is not possible, to see you dead and buried. Choose your friends
 wisely, and your enemies with even more care. Good day.
alteracoes.para: Há forças agindo aqui em Scrapheap que gostariam de te usar, e, se isso não for possível, de te ver morto e enterrado. Escolha seus amigos com sabedoria, e seus inimigos com ainda mais cuidado. Bom dia.

alteracoes.en:
We thank you for getting rid of the Crypts and the Fools. Without the
 power generator, my people will have a poor life. Do you think you could fix it?
alteracoes.de:
We thank you for getting rid of the Crypts and the Fools. Without the
 power generator, my people will have a poor life. Do you think you could fix it?
alteracoes.para: Agradecemos por se livrar dos Crypts e dos Tolos. Sem o gerador de energia, meu povo terá uma vida pobre. Você acha que conseguiria consertá-lo?

alteracoes.en: Fix it yourself. I want my reward.
alteracoes.de: Fix it yourself. I want my reward.
alteracoes.para: Conserte você mesmo. Quero minha recompensa.

alteracoes.en:
Very well, you shall have it. You have cast my people into a cold night,
 and then abandoned us to the wolves - but I understand that your quest is
 more important.
alteracoes.de:
Very well, you shall have it. You have cast my people into a cold night,
 and then abandoned us to the wolves - but I understand that your quest is
 more important.
alteracoes.para: Muito bem, você a terá. Você lançou meu povo numa noite fria e então nos abandonou aos lobos - mas entendo que sua missão é mais importante.

alteracoes.en:
The violence you have started may lead straight back to my people. Please
 finish it.
alteracoes.de:
The violence you have started may lead straight back to my people. Please
 finish it.
alteracoes.para: A violência que você começou pode voltar direto pro meu povo. Por favor, termine o que começou.

alteracoes.en: Just like you cowards to lay the task for death on the shoulders of others.
alteracoes.de: Just like you cowards to lay the task for death on the shoulders of others.
alteracoes.para: Típico de covardes como você jogar a tarefa da morte nos ombros dos outros.

alteracoes.en:
If you need help, I will provide it, but don't ask my people. They are
 too tired of death and pain. I will join you, if that is what you wish.
alteracoes.de:
If you need help, I will provide it, but don't ask my people. They are
 too tired of death and pain. I will join you, if that is what you wish.
alteracoes.para: Se você precisar de ajuda, eu forneço, mas não peça ao meu povo. Estão cansados demais de morte e dor. Vou me juntar a você, se é o que você deseja.

alteracoes.en: Yes, follow me, and attack when I do.
alteracoes.de: Yes, follow me, and attack when I do.
alteracoes.para: Sim, me siga e ataque quando eu atacar.

alteracoes.en: No. I'm just making a social comment.
alteracoes.de: No. I'm just making a social comment.
alteracoes.para: Não. Só estou fazendo um comentário social.

alteracoes.en:
Just as I suspected, you don't care about anything except your own needs.
 Join our enemies, bring fear to my people, and betray your own background.
alteracoes.de:
Just as I suspected, you don't care about anything except your own needs.
 Join our enemies, bring fear to my people, and betray your own background.
alteracoes.para: Bem como eu suspeitava, você não se importa com nada além das próprias necessidades. Junte-se aos nossos inimigos, traga medo ao meu povo e traia sua própria origem.

alteracoes.en: I'm going to kill you for saying that.
alteracoes.de: I'm going to kill you for saying that.
alteracoes.para: Vou te matar por dizer isso.

alteracoes.en: It's a plan. I'm infiltrating this gang.
alteracoes.de: It's a plan. I'm infiltrating this gang.
alteracoes.para: É um plano. Estou me infiltrando nesta gangue.

alteracoes.en: I thought you would, you worm.
alteracoes.de: I thought you would, you worm.
alteracoes.para: Eu sabia que você faria, seu verme.

alteracoes.en: Perhaps, but actions speak louder than words.
alteracoes.de: Perhaps, but actions speak louder than words.
alteracoes.para: Talvez, mas ações falam mais alto que palavras.

alteracoes.en: What can I help you with?
alteracoes.de: What can I help you with?

alteracoes.en: Tell me about the power generator.
alteracoes.de: Tell me about the power generator.
alteracoes.para: Me fale sobre o gerador de energia.

alteracoes.en: Scrapheap is our town. It was our home. And it will be again, hopefully.
alteracoes.de: Scrapheap is our town. It was our home. And it will be again, hopefully.
alteracoes.para: Scrapheap é a nossa cidade. Era o nosso lar. E voltará a ser, com sorte.

alteracoes.en:
The power generator supplies all the electicity in town. Without it,
 we would surely die. It is the most important thing in town. Whoever controls
 it, controls Scrapheap.
alteracoes.de:
The power generator supplies all the electicity in town. Without it,
 we would surely die. It is the most important thing in town. Whoever controls
 it, controls Scrapheap.
alteracoes.para: O gerador de energia fornece toda a eletricidade da cidade. Sem ele, com certeza morreríamos. É a coisa mais importante da cidade. Quem o controla, controla Scrapheap.

alteracoes.en:
The Crypts are a gang run by Rayze. He's an animal and has one
 of the largest guns I've ever seen. He lets Lenny live, cuz he takes care
 of the Brahmin, which provide fuel for the generator. The Crypts are in the
 big house.
alteracoes.de:
The Crypts are a gang run by Rayze. He's an animal and has one
 of the largest guns I've ever seen. He lets Lenny live, cuz he takes care
 of the Brahmin, which provide fuel for the generator. The Crypts are in the
 big house.
alteracoes.para: Os Crypts são uma gangue comandada pelo Rayze. Ele é um animal e tem uma das maiores armas que eu já vi. Ele deixa o Lenny viver porque ele cuida dos Brahmin, que fornecem combustível pro gerador. Os Crypts ficam na casa grande.

alteracoes.en:
Baka leads the Fools. If she had any more men, she'd surely attack
 the Crypts and try to take back the power generator.  You can tell the
 Crypts from the Fools by their armor. Fools wear metal, Crypts leather.
alteracoes.de:
Baka leads the Fools. If she had any more men, she'd surely attack
 the Crypts and try to take back the power generator.  You can tell the
 Crypts from the Fools by their armor. Fools wear metal, Crypts leather.
alteracoes.para: A Baka lidera os Tolos. Se ela tivesse mais homens, com certeza atacaria os Crypts e tentaria retomar o gerador de energia. Dá pra diferenciar os Crypts dos Tolos pela armadura. Tolos usam metal, Crypts usam couro.

alteracoes.en: hours on the Vault computer teaching system but learn nothing new of importance. The outside world is your teacher now.
alteracoes.de: hours on the Vault computer teaching system but learn nothing new of importance. The outside world is your teacher now.
alteracoes.para: horas no sistema de ensino do computador do Vault, mas não aprende nada de importante novo. O mundo exterior é seu professor agora.

alteracoes.en: hours on the interwebs doing nothing of importance. It was fun but leaves you feeling empty inside.
alteracoes.de: hours on the interwebs doing nothing of importance. It was fun but leaves you feeling empty inside.
alteracoes.para: horas na internet fazendo nada de importante. Foi divertido, mas te deixa com um vazio por dentro.

alteracoes.en: hours on the interwebs searching for pornography and videos of cats.
alteracoes.de: hours on the interwebs searching for pornography and videos of cats.
alteracoes.para: horas na internet procurando pornografia e vídeos de gatos.

alteracoes.en: Hi. How can I help you?
alteracoes.de: Hi. How can I help you?

alteracoes.en: I want to pay off my loan.
alteracoes.de: I want to pay off my loan.

alteracoes.en: Another loan? Did you even leave the building? How about you do something fun first? Maybe over in the Maltese Falcon! Come back to me later.
alteracoes.de: Another loan? Did you even leave the building? How about you do something fun first? Maybe over in the Maltese Falcon! Come back to me later.
alteracoes.para: Outro empréstimo? Você chegou a sair do prédio? Que tal fazer algo divertido primeiro? Talvez lá no Maltese Falcon! Volte aqui depois.

alteracoes.en: Already? Did you even leave the building? I'm busy, come back another time!
alteracoes.de: Already? Did you even leave the building? I'm busy, come back another time!
alteracoes.para: Já? Você chegou a sair do prédio? Estou ocupado, volte outra hora!

alteracoes.en: You seem to be an alright lass, but me times busy with keeping the Blades schooled. If things were to straighten themselves, I might be havin' the time then.
alteracoes.de: You seem to be an alright lass, but me times busy with keeping the Blades schooled. If things were to straighten themselves, I might be havin' the time then.
alteracoes.para: Você parece uma moça de bem, mas meu tempo anda ocupado mantendo as Lâminas treinadas. Se as coisas se ajeitassem, aí talvez eu tivesse tempo.

alteracoes.en: He appears to be the owner of this establishment. The phrase "under new management" comes to mind.
alteracoes.de: He appears to be the owner of this establishment. The phrase "under new management" comes to mind.
alteracoes.para: Ele parece ser o dono deste estabelecimento. A expressão "sob nova direção" vem à mente.

alteracoes.en: You see the holodisk that Maxson gave you.
alteracoes.de: You see the holodisk that Maxson gave you.
alteracoes.para: Você vê o holodisco que o Maxson te deu.

alteracoes.de: Pip-Boy 2000 displays: "Downloading ... Aborting, data already exists!"
alteracoes.para: O Pip-Boy 2000 exibe: "Baixando ... Abortando, os dados já existem!"

alteracoes.para: O Pip-Boy 2000 exibe: "Baixando dados ... ... ... Concluído. Tenha um bom dia!"

alteracoes.en: This disk bears the Brotherhood of Steel insignia and is in excellent condition. It can be used in your Pip-Boy.
alteracoes.de: This disk bears the Brotherhood of Steel insignia and is in excellent condition. It can be used in your Pip-Boy.
alteracoes.para: Este disco traz a insígnia da Irmandade do Aço e está em excelente estado. Pode ser usado no seu Pip-Boy.
Ei, você ouviu que Set foi desativado?
Conjunto está morto. Set está morto. Set está morto. . .

alteracoes.en: Okay, well let's have a look then. Hold still for a moment.
alteracoes.de: Okay, well let's have a look then. Hold still for a moment.
alteracoes.para: Certo, bom, vamos dar uma olhada então. Fique parado por um instante.

alteracoes.en: I'm wildly irradiated, help me! My skin is melting off!
alteracoes.de: I'm wildly irradiated, help me! My skin is melting off!
alteracoes.para: Estou muito irradiado, me ajude! Minha pele está derretendo!

alteracoes.en: I will be able to completely heal you of your radiation sickness, which is
alteracoes.de: I will be able to completely heal you of your radiation sickness, which is

alteracoes.de: hours. I will be able to completely heal you of your radiation sickness, which is
